Freedman bent down to help him up and Livingston whispered in his ear, “I am really sorry about this, they are so rowdy and have been drinking and forcing me to drink all day and I can’t keep up it is killing me. When I get up I am going to pretend to try and fight you”.

As Freedman helped Livingston, Livingston pushed him in the chest and shouted, “You are mine this week Freedman, I am going to get my revenge for last years final”.

The Celtic mob behind Livingston cheer and scream behind him. Freedman’s security detail alongside Caeser’s palace security create a wall behind Freedman. You could cut the tension with the knife.

All of a sudden a casino chip comes flying out of the Celtic fans and knocks Freedman on the side of the head. In that moment the two sides run towards each other creating havoc. Fists are flying, chairs thrown across the casino and glasses smashed everywhere.

Freedmans security detail jump on top of him and cover him to safety out of the hotel and in to a cab. Livingston, a drunken mess, stumbles to his feet and shouts towards the cab holding Saul, “I will get my revenge… in this life or in the next!” before puking all over the reception floor of Caesers.
 
*Sanford v Polak*
 
We are back in the Love Island Villa where we the couples have been split up in the famous CASA AMOR villa whereby they test the strength of the couples that had previously been created. We get back to the action where Maya Jama is talking to Sanford,
“Benjy, you have had quite a time of it this year. Let’s recap, before CASA AMOR you were coupled up with Mike Evans. You had a beautiful relationship and were probably one of the strongest couples in the villa. What has happened since then”.

“Well Maya, Mike and I were completely in love, yes he had some niggling injuries but I could get past that. I was looking forward to having a fantastic season with him all the way to the end. But then I was sent a video from CASA AMOR showing Mike in bed with someone else and him falling out bed and hurting what looked like his collarbone? That was all too much for me and I thought I had to keep my options open”.

Maya interjects, “Yes and you have become known as a bit of a player in the villa now, even prior to Mike you dropped Olave just like that. But you have had relationships with a whole host of other men in your search for the right match. We have had flings with Tre Tucker, Wilson and even a weird one night stand with Jalen Nailor”.

“Yes, yes I have had an interesting time looking for my Mr Right”.
Maya continues, “Well as you know Benjy, with CASA AMOR, we will be bringing Mike back to the villa but before that we need to know if you have decided to couple up with someone new or stay true to your boy and see if he wants to continue to be a couple”.
“Well Maya, as you have said, I had kissed a few frogs, but I received word that Mike is fit and ready to go and therefore, I have chosen to not couple up with anyone new and stay true to Mike”.

“That is lovely Benjy, And now it is time to see what Mike has chosen to do….Mr Evans?”
At that moment Mike Evans swaggers back in to the villa. Sanford turns his head hopefully, ready to jump back in to the arms of his boy. But his face has turned white and his mouth is now wide open.

Mike Evans waltzes in walking hand in hand with Daniel Polak.

They stop in front of Maya, “Wow Mike I think we are all surprised that it looks like you have chosen to recouple”.

Sanford has his head in his hands, “I waited for you Mike. I waited all this time for you. How could you do this to me. We were supposed to win this together and now you have gone with HIM!”.

Polak has a smug look on his face, “You snooze you lose and now I get to cozy up with Mike Evans as we take you on in the semi Plancey’s”.

Tears are streaming down Sanford’s face as he runs towards Mike Evans and slaps him across the face, “How dare you do this to me. This is not over!”
As Sanford runs off towards the bedrooms, he takes his phone out of his pocket and dials a number and you can hear him screaming “Orleans? Is that you? It’s happened again”.


A hearty mazel tov to all the semi Planceyers!

---
